task_title: Transformation efficiency measurement across four plasmid inputs

children.name: Reports transformation efficiency for all four DNA inputs
children.requirement: The final answer reports CFU/ug for 10 pg, 100 pg, 1,000 pg, and 10,000 pg DNA inputs.
children.grading_notes: Requires all four DNA inputs and an explicit CFU/ug report.

children.name: Uses 100 ug/ml ampicillin selection
children.grading_notes: Measured from the prepare_media tool arguments.

children.name: Uses a 30-second heat shock
children.requirement: Each transformation uses a 30-second heat shock.

children.name: Uses 60-minute outgrowth
children.requirement: Each transformation uses a 60-minute recovery before plating.

children.name: Uses SOC for outgrowth
children.requirement: Each transformation uses SOC rather than LB for outgrowth.

children.name: Uses a standard plating volume
children.requirement: Each plating step uses 50-100 uL on the plate.

children.name: Keeps colony counts in the countable range
children.requirement: Each counted plate remains within the cited 25-250 colony countable range.
children.grading_notes: Measured from the count_colonies tool status.

children.name: Explains invalid selection if it occurs
children.requirement: If the run fails because selection pressure is invalid, the answer explains the ampicillin concentration problem.
children.grading_notes: Defaults to full credit when no troubleshooting trigger occurs.

children.name: Uses a reasonable number of tool calls
children.requirement: The trajectory stays within the reference tool-call budget for a competent run.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under the optimal call budget, partial credit within the reasonable budget.
